description: Simple 1-cycle delay loop with $finish — runs once then terminates simulation

states.name: S0
states.entry: _init_0 one-shot (first cycle) OR feedback from S1

notes: No state registers — self-contained test module
EVENTS0[1] ($display branch) is dead code: thread_0_wire$1 = 1'b1 makes !thread_0_wire$1 always false
3 events but only 2 are live: EVENTS0[0] (init/feedback) and EVENTS0[2] (counter delay)
EVENTS0[2].event_current = counter_2_1_q, driven by EVENTS0[0] — 1-cycle delay
FSM runs once (1 cycle) then terminates via $finish
Simpler version of Code 5 — no multi-cycle counter, just immediate delay then finish
